result_summary: Redesigned landing page with prominent form and courier imagery increased leads by 95%
Customer-testimonial focused redesign increased free trial signups by 102% and paid signups by 47%
Adding social login options increased revenue by 3.4%
Simplified quote page removing navigation increased form submissions by 37%
Real-world contextual product images increased add-to-cart clicks by 71%
Clarified value proposition increased overall purchases by 1890% and basic signups by 2790%
More specific subheadline increased signups by 15%
Streamlined pricing table with improved CTAs and social proof increased click-through by 25%
Long-form homepage with testimonial video increased signups by 87%
Reduced distraction around CTA increased click-through rate by 11%
